findings.title: No tests for payment refund path
findings.code_snippet: # No test exists — src/payments/refund.py is 0% covered
findings.evidence: pytest --cov shows refund.py 0/74 lines covered. A regression here causes real customer money loss. Critical path should be at ≥80%.
findings.action: Add integration test refund_succeeds_within_90_days + refund_rejected_after_90_days using Stripe test mode.

findings.title: Flaky test due to system clock dependency
findings.evidence: Test relies on real wall clock — passes only between 00:00-00:59 UTC. CI fails ~96% of runs depending on schedule.
findings.action: Use freezegun: @freeze_time('2026-01-01 00:30:00') to deterministically control time.

ideas.title: Add mutation testing with mutmut to detect weak assertions
ideas.detail: Current coverage is 78% but mutation score likely <40%. mutmut run on src/ surfaces tests that pass with broken code — forces stronger assertions where they matter.

ideas.title: Replace hand-rolled fixtures with factory-boy for model instances
ideas.detail: Current conftest has 400 lines of setup code with repeated patterns. factory-boy cuts boilerplate by ~70% and makes test intent clearer.
